`defer` registers exactly one direct, message, or type-side cleanup invocation. Block, inline callable, control expression, guard, and await forms are not current.
Every admitting owner accepts at most one positive or negative GuardClause. Chained guards are not admitted. Product execution remains NOT_RUN.
Explicit-exclusive i..<j is accepted and emits SLICE_HALF_OPEN_RANGE_NONCANONICAL; canonical source uses inclusive i..j. This warning never rejects or silently rewrites the slice.
